Anyways, here's the takeaway:
1. Attackers already have what they need to develop exploits rapidly.
2. They're going to steal creds to accomplish this, so unlike your paltry Copilot account, they have infinite resources.
3. Improving patch cycle isn't good enough, you must reduce attack surface.

Finally, exploit chaining - the one place where Mythos isn't hype. Here's the thing though, few of the bugs that are getting governments and corporations owned require complex multi-step exploit chaining.

They move from Firefox exploit dev to Windows, a much harder challenge, but what I take away from this is how capable Sonnet is. Given that sonnet is made available via so many 3rd party delivery models, exploit devs can steal creds on nearly any platform and get windows kernel exploits.

Stripe's PR-from-Slack works because the task has a natural acceptance gate (the PR either builds or it doesn't). The pattern scales to any task with an explicit gate — the problem is applying it to tasks without one, then wondering why output needs extensive review.

The third failure pattern (prioritizing task size) is the one that compounds — agents given tasks beyond their reliable scope don't fail loudly, they partially succeed and produce plausible-wrong outputs. Smaller scoped tasks fail obviously; oversized tasks fail quietly.

Open-source real-time voice is where the architecture tradeoffs get real — WebSocket with chunked audio vs WebRTC, echo cancellation ownership (browser vs backend), and whether the STT/LLM/TTS pipeline runs co-located or distributed across three APIs. Each topology has a different latency floor.

external.description: Job Description: We believe in bold ideas, diverse perspectives, and the drive to transform knowledge into impact. Here, your curiosity fuels progress, your voice shapes innovation, and your ambition helps redefine what’s possible within science and learning. We are a culture that obsesses over impact, challenges, and drives what’s next to power infinite possibilities for our customers, colleagues and society at large. About the Role: Wiley’s journal portfolio is looking for a dynamic and ambitious individual to join the team in the role of Editor-in-Chief. You will use your background in scientific research, your knowledge of the publishing landscape, and your strong communication and networking skills to drive the strategic development of one or more journals across materials science, engineering, chemistry, applied physics, biotechnology, and environmental sciences. This is an exciting opportunity to shape the future direction of an established journal, raising its profile and visibility within the research community, attracting high-quality authors and content, and supporting growth into emerging and interdisciplinary subject areas. The Editor-in-Chief will also be involved in the peer-review process and decision-making for submitted manuscripts, ensuring adherence to best practices and the highest ethical standards in publishing. Job Responsibilities: Leverage your network, subject expertise, understanding of research trends, and desk research skills to drive content acquisition and submission growth. Strategically develop one or more journals from both scientific and publishing perspectives, with a focus on strengthening the journal’s position within its broader portfolio and research community. Support the journal’s expansion into relevant growth areas while maintaining strength across its existing core scope. Establish and maintain a strong network of scientists, including authors, peer reviewers, editorial board members, and wider community stakeholders. Represent Wiley and the journal portfolio at conferences and through in-person and virtual outreach activities at universities, research institutes, and relevant scientific communities. Contribute to the editorial evaluation, peer review, and decision-making process for submitted manuscripts. Identify opportunities to attract high-quality submissions, develop commissioning strategies, and build visibility for the journal within relevant research communities. Collaborate with your manager and colleagues to establish a team culture of trust, respect, collaboration, and high performance. What we are looking for A PhD in materials science, engineering, chemistry, applied physics, biotechnology, environmental sciences, or a closely related field, with an excellent research background and a strong understanding of recent trends and developments. Strong teamwork and communication skills, with a flexible and innovative approach to problems and a focus on defining and achieving outcomes. Ability to work in a collaborative setting and achieve results through personal influence and engagement. A self-motivated, diplomatic, and flexible approach with outstanding organizational and time management skills and an excellent command of the English language (both written and verbal). A strong understanding of scientific publishing, including commissioning and the peer-review process. Prior experience in the publishing industry is highly desired. A keen interest in science communication and strong desire to advocate for innovations in publishing and open research. Confidence to present and represent the journal portfolio at conferences and through institute visits, nurture existing contacts and develop new networks, including the willingness to travel. We power infinite possibilities. For more than 200 years, we've transformed knowledge into discoveries that shape the world. Today, our global team of innovators, creators, and experts is driving what's next in science, education, and publishing—creating impact that reaches everywhere. We're not just observers of progress. We're the ones accelerating scientific breakthroughs, advancing learning, and sparking innovation that redefines entire fields and improves lives. Here, your talent matters. Your ideas have room to grow. And your work creates breakthroughs that can change everything. Wiley is an equal opportunity/affirmative action employer. We evaluate all qualified applicants and treat all qualified applicants and employees without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, genetic information, or based on any individual's status in any group or class protected by applicable federal, state or local laws. Wiley is also committed to providing reasonable accommodation to applicants and employees with disabilities. Applicants who require accommodation to participate in the job application process may contact tasupport@wiley.com for assistance. We are proud that our workplace promotes continual learning and internal mobility. Our values support courageous teammates, needle movers, and learning champions all while striving to support the health and well-being of all employees. We offer meeting-free Friday afternoons allowing more time for heads down work and professional development, and through a robust body of employee programing we facilitate a wide range of opportunities to foster community, learn, and grow. We are committed to fair, transparent pay, and we strive to provide competitive compensation in addition to a comprehensive benefits package. It is anticipated that most qualified candidates will fall within the range, however the ultimate salary offered for this role may be higher or lower and will be set based on a variety of non-discriminatory factors, including but not limited to, geographic location, skills, and competencies. Wiley proactively displays target base pay range for United Kingdom, Canada and USA based roles. When applying, please attach your resume/CV to be considered. #LI-JG2 If you like wild growth and working with happy, enthusiastic over-achievers, you'll enjoy your career with us! Introduce yourself to our recruiters and we'll get in touch if there's a role that seems like a good match. We're a forward-thinking organization dedicated to innovation and growth. Our success is built on the diverse talents and perspectives of our team members, who work together to solve complex challenges and create meaningful impact. We foster a culture of continuous learning, collaboration, and professional development. Applicants who have any questions about the job application process may contact Talent Acquisition Support for assistance.
external.title: Editor-in-Chief, Multidisciplinary/Applied Sciences

images.alt:
Mit einem Teaser gab die japanische Fima Good Smile Company bekannt, dass das Projekt »Heavily Armed High School Girls (JP: Jū Heisōgata Joshi Kōsei)« vom Illustrator neco eine Anime-Adaption erhält. Neben dem Produktionsteam wurde auch der Starttermin offiziell bekannt gegeben.

Die Ausstrahlung im japanischen TV soll im laufe des nächsten Jahres 2027 starten. Der Anime basiert auf dem Originalkonzept von neco. Die Regie übernimmt Masaki Tachibana (Princess Principal, Star Wars: Visions Volume 3), während Natsuko Takahashi (Yuyushiki, Tokyo Magnitude 8.0) für die Serienkomposition verantwortlich ist. Produziert wird der Anime gemeinsam von Good Smile Film und Good Smile Company.

📜 Beschreibung 》
In einer zerstörten Welt richtet ein geheimnisvolles Mädchen ihren Blick in den fernen Himmel, während die Oberschülerin Ichi regungslos vor der Trümmerlandschaft steht. Zwischen Stille, Verlust und einer ungewissen Zukunft kreuzen sich ihre Wege. Was sie in dieser verwüsteten Welt entdecken, könnte nicht nur ihr eigenes Schicksal verändern, sondern auch die Geschichte, die sie gemeinsam hinterlassen.

Nice to have your right to exist as an equal human being considered "a 10 percent disagreement" by the woman who's been appointed the trans whisperer by the DNC.

images.alt:
“I think we’ve been trying something different for a couple of years now, and it hasn’t worked,” she said. “I might be wrong. This theory of change might not work. But I do believe that if you look through our history, you do see that it is the theory of change that most consistently works.”

That theory involves patience, persuasion, and allowing space for growth. McBride also urged Democrats to welcome voters who may not yet fully support trans rights but are otherwise aligned with the party’s goals.

“If you’re 90 percent with someone, but we excommunicate you because of 10 percent, the right’s very good about saying, ‘Well, welcome on in,’” she said. “You’re being oppressed by the left… punished by the left… welcome into our club.”

McBride warned that this strategy risks alienating persuadable people who then adopt more extreme views. “Instead of being with us on 90 percent, they flip to being against us on 90 percent,” she said. “That is human nature.”

For her, inclusion isn’t compromise—it’s an opportunity.

“Democracy only works if you are willing to have conversations across disagreement,” McBride said. “And if you are willing to join forces with people who might agree with you on most things but maybe disagree with you on some things.”

That message, she acknowledged, doesn’t always land well with activists demanding urgent change. “I get why people would be skeptical of this theory of change,” she said. “It hasn’t delivered enough change fast enough. But we’ve got to return to the basics. We’ve got to fill the knowledge gap.”

Die Theorie, die niemals verliert: Hans Albert, Karl Popper und der alte Streit um Sätze, die an der Wirklichkeit scheitern dürfen

Der Positivismusstreit trägt einen falschen Namen. Schon darin liegt ein Stück deutscher Geistesgeschichte. Karl Popper war kein Positivist....

external.description: Der Positivismusstreit trägt einen falschen Namen. Schon darin liegt ein Stück deutscher Geistesgeschichte. Karl Popper war kein Positivist. Hans Albert war es ebenfalls nicht. Beide glaubten weder an die Anhäufung gesicherter Tatsachen noch an eine Wissenschaft, die Wirklichkeit einfach registriert wie ein Messgerät. Ihr Denken begann an einer empfindlicheren Stelle: Ein wissenschaftlicher Satz muss etwas aufs Spiel setzen. Er muss so gebaut sein, dass Erfahrung ihm gefährlich werden kann.

この絵画は、深い森の奥深く、雨が降りしきる湖のほとりを描いた幻想的で静かな作品です。キャンバス全体に油絵特有の重厚な質感が漂っています。

中央の構造物: 画面中央には、古びて苔むした、あるいは風化した大きな石造りのアーチ橋がそびえ立っています。

ドラゴン: その橋の頂上には、黒く長い東洋風のドラゴン（竜）のシルエットが横たわっています。尾はアーチの下へとしなやかに垂れ下がり、頭部は右側を向き、静かに下を見下ろしています。

人物の佇まい: 右下の湖畔には、マントを羽織った一人の人物の黒いシルエットが佇んでおり、橋の上のドラゴンを見上げているかのように見えます。

背景と色彩: 周囲はオレンジや茶色に色づいた木々に囲まれ、背景や湖面は深い青緑色（ターコイズブルー）と黒で満たされています。全体にうっすらと縦の直線が描かれ、激しい雨が降り注いでいる様子と、それが湖面に反射する美しい情景が表現されています。
